case_title: ANGEL ESTUARDO MARTINEZ-JUT VS. GREEN BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ-JUT, ANGEL ESTUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
